summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Dashboard (Power BI style redesign). All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend features verified: Modelo x Tienda main pivot with all 11 tiendas as columns, collapsible sidebar (60px/220px), KPI cards, multi-select filter popovers, pivot by tienda (Color x Talla), expandable Modelo x Talla section, expandable detail table with pagination. Other pages (Catalogo, Cuentas, Contactos) work correctly with the new Layout.

critical.issue: Filter by marca fails with 'column reference marca is ambiguous' error. Root cause: line 1487 in server.py reconstructs WHERE clause without table aliases when query joins modelo_totals CTE and main table f

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filtros returns 8 filter arrays (tiendas, marcas, tipos, entalles, telas, tallas, colors, modelos)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/kpis returns total_stock=47987, modelos=1153, variantes=7027, tiendas=11
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/kpis with tienda filter works (tiendas_con_stock=1)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/kpis with marca filter works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/kpis with es_lq filter works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo returns Modelo x Talla pivot with tallas, rows, totals
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo with tienda filter works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo pagination works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo-tienda returns 11 tiendas as columns (AP, BOOSH, Fallados Qepo, GM207, GM209, GM218, GR238, GR55, REMATE, TALLER, ZAP)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo-tienda with single tienda filter works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo-tienda pagination works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-tienda?pivot_tienda=AP returns Color x Talla matrix
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/detalle returns paginated detail with all expected fields
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/detalle with tienda filter works
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/detalle pagination works
Frontend: Stock Dashboard loads at /stock-dashboard
Frontend: KPI cards show correct values (Stock: 47,987 | Modelos: 1153 | Variantes: 7027 | Tiendas: 11)
Frontend: Main pivot (Modelo x Tienda) shows all 11 tiendas as column headers
Frontend: CLASIC model shows 649 total (371 in TALLER) - matches expected data
Frontend: Sidebar collapsed width is 60px
Frontend: Sidebar expanded width is 220px
Frontend: Sidebar toggle button works and state persists in localStorage
Frontend: Multi-select filter popovers work (tested Tienda filter)
Frontend: Tienda selector for Color x Talla section works
Frontend: Expandable Modelo x Talla section works
Frontend: Expandable Detail table section works
Frontend: Pagination visible (Pag 1 de 24)
Frontend: Catalogo page works with new Layout
Frontend: Cuentas page works with new Layout
Frontend: Contactos page works with new Layout
action_items: FIX (HIGH): /api/stock-dashboard/pivot-modelo-tienda fails when filtering by marca - SQL ambiguous column reference. Fix line 1487 in server.py to use table alias 'f.' for filter conditions in the JOIN query
critical_code_review_comments: Bug in server.py line 1487: The WHERE clause reconstruction doesn't use table aliases, causing 'marca is ambiguous' error when both modelo_totals CTE and table f have marca column
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Dashboard (Power BI style) fully functional. Main pivot shows Modelo x Tienda with 11 store columns. Known bug: pivot-modelo-tienda endpoint fails with marca filter due to ambiguous column reference. KPI reference values: 47987 stock, 1153 modelos, 7027 variantes, 11 tiendas. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_stock_dashboard.py cover all endpoints.
